allow: Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/projects/50d9c26a-f594-455b-bd8d-e66b0a037744" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ev=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('evaluation',{}\); print\('tech_score:', ev.get\('tech_score'\)\); print\('tech_feedback:', repr\(ev.get\('tech_feedback'\)\)[:200] if ev.get\('tech_feedback'\) else 'None'\); print\('investor_score:', ev.get\('investor_score'\)\); print\('market_score:', ev.get\('market_score'\)\); print\('is_confirmed:', ev.get\('is_confirmed'\)\); print\('total_score:', ev.get\('total_score'\)\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "Could not fetch or parse")
